source_snapshots.title: NVIDIA Form 10-K FY2026 - Manufacturing disclosure
source_snapshots.evidence_scope: NVIDIA foundry and manufacturing supplier disclosure
source_snapshots.expected_entities_or_stages: NVIDIA Corporation; TSMC; Samsung; SK hynix; Micron; Hon Hai/Foxconn; Wistron; Fabrinet; foundry; wafer; CoWoS; assembly; testing; packaging
source_snapshots.notes: SEC-hosted NVIDIA filing. Use to create candidate supplier/manufacturing facts only; one source is insufficient for automatic publication.
source_snapshots.locator: SEC NVIDIA Form 10-K FY2026, Item 1 Business, Manufacturing section
source_snapshots.support_excerpt: NVIDIA says it utilizes foundries such as TSMC to produce semiconductor wafers.

source_snapshots.title: Busting ASML myths
source_snapshots.evidence_scope: ASML lithography systems used by named chipmakers
source_snapshots.expected_entities_or_stages: ASML; TSMC; Intel; Samsung; DUV; EUV; lithography; equipment
source_snapshots.notes: ASML official story identifies TSMC among customers using ASML DUV and EUV lithography systems; use as equipment-provider candidate evidence.
source_snapshots.locator: ASML Stories, 'Busting ASML myths', customer and lithography passages
source_snapshots.support_excerpt: ASML says customers such as TSMC use its DUV and EUV lithography systems.

source_snapshots.title: NVIDIA and TSMC Celebrate New Milestone: 500 Million Processors
source_snapshots.expected_entities_or_stages: TSMC; NVIDIA Corporation; wafer; processor; manufacturing; foundry
source_snapshots.notes: TSMC official news release independently supports the NVIDIA-TSMC manufacturing relationship; use as secondary official support and preserve historical date semantics.
source_snapshots.locator: TSMC Press Center release 1408 (2006-10-24), NVIDIA-TSMC 500-million-processor milestone, body text
source_snapshots.support_excerpt: TSMC says NVIDIA and TSMC celebrated the milestone of 500 million NVIDIA processors manufactured by TSMC, confirming the foundry manufacturing partnership.

source_snapshots.title: TSMC and ASML Reach Agreement to Develop Next Generation Lithography Technologies as an Extension of Long-Term Partnership
source_snapshots.expected_entities_or_stages: TSMC; ASML; EUV; lithography; equipment; technology
source_snapshots.notes: TSMC official news release independently supports the ASML-TSMC lithography equipment and technology relationship; use as secondary official support and preserve historical date semantics.
source_snapshots.locator: TSMC Press Center release 1734 (2012-08-05), TSMC-ASML next-generation lithography partnership agreement, body text
source_snapshots.support_excerpt: TSMC says it reached an agreement with ASML to develop next-generation lithography technologies as an extension of their long-term equipment partnership.
